hero.title: Albion Online Farming Guide
hero.description: Master the art of resource gathering across all tiers. From beginner zones to the most dangerous T8 Outlands, discover the best farming spots and strategies.

builds.title: ⚔️ Recommended Gathering Builds
builds.description: Optimize your equipment for maximum efficiency and safety while gathering T8 resources.

biomes.title: Biome Distribution
biomes.description: Each city specializes in different resources. Choose your farming location based on what you need.

biome_descriptions.swamp: Mystical wetlands with abundant fiber resources and hidden dangers in the mist.
biome_descriptions.forest: Ancient woodlands filled with towering trees and rich wood resources.
biome_descriptions.mountain: Majestic peaks with glowing ore deposits and treacherous terrain.
biome_descriptions.highland: Rocky plateaus with plentiful stone and valuable mineral deposits.
biome_descriptions.steppe: Vast plains where hunters gather hides and fiber under the setting sun.

tiers.title: Tier Progression Guide
tiers.description: Learn the best strategies for each tier level, from safe beginner zones to dangerous T8 Outlands.

tips: Focus on leveling up your gathering tools quickly
Use Learning Points to speed up progression
Don't spend too much time here - move to T2-T3 ASAP
Red zones offer better resource yields but higher risk
Always use Pork Pie to increase carry capacity
Consider gathering gear for yield bonuses
Use Invisibility Shrines for safe travel to deeper zones
Farm during off-peak hours to avoid gankers
Always plan an escape route
Consider farming in Gold Mists for solo players
Use Roads of Avalon for group farming
High competition - timing is key
Watchtower territories are the best T8 sources
Farm with guild support or in hidden spots
Expect extreme competition and constant danger
Use premium gear and mounts for survival

t8Maps.title: T8 Farming Locations
t8Maps.description: Specific map names for each resource type in the Outlands (Black Zone). These are the most valuable farming spots.

events.title: 📅 Asia Server Events & Schedule
events.description: Important events and timings for Asia server farming activities.
events.worldBossDesc: World Bosses spawn every even-numbered hour (00:00, 02:00, 04:00, etc.) on Asia server to avoid maintenance collision.
events.worldBossNote: High risk, high reward farming opportunity
events.primeTimeDesc: Peak activity period for PvP and guild activities. Extreme danger in black zones.
events.primeTimeNote: Best time for group farming with guild protection
events.dangerWindowDesc: Highest concentration of gankers and PvP players. Avoid solo gathering in black zones.
events.dangerWindowNote: Stick to blue/yellow zones or farm with group
events.lowActivityDesc: Safest time for solo farming with reduced competition and ganking risk.
events.lowActivityNote: Best for new players and solo farmers

efficiency.title: Efficiency Tips
tips: Use Pork Pie to increase carry capacity
Gather in biomes matching your resource type
Focus on one resource to T8 for max profit
Use Learning Points to speed up leveling
efficiency.radiantTip: 💡 Tip: Use the new Loot All button from Radiant Wilds for faster PvE farming!

safety.title: Safety Strategies
tips: Use Invisibility Shrines for safe travel
Farm during off-peak server hours
Always have escape gear ready
Travel with guild members when possible

profitability.title: Resource Profitability
tips: Stone: Low competition, stable profit
Fishing: High profit, requires patience
Ore: Medium competition, good returns
Hide & Fiber: High competition, varied profit

footer.text: Albion Online Farming Guide 2026 • Last Updated: May 2026
footer.author: Author: ABID

guide.panelSubtitle: Asia Server — Your complete journey from beginner to legend
